wikitext:
{{Relic Infobox|Daughter of the Wind|2}}
{{R|Daughter of the Wind||2}} is an {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Event|Event|2}} {{2|Relics|Relic}} from the {{E|Doll Room|2}} event. Whenever you play an {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Attack|Attack|2}}, it will give 1 {{KW|Block||2}}.

== Sources ==
Can only be obtained from the {{E|Doll Room|2}} event. 

== Interactions ==
=== Order ===
*When attacking an enemy with {{KW|Thorns||2}}, the {{KW|Block||2}} will be gained after taking damage from {{KW|Thorns||2}}.

== Trivia ==

== Update History ==
* '''Early Access v0.98'''
** Added Daughter of the Wind to the game.
